arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's advice to Wayne Rooney comes back to haunt him after Plymouth sacking
arts.sum: A stark warning from former Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson has rung true as Wayne Rooney finds himself out of work again after being sacked by Plymouth

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus carried off on stretcher during Arsenal-Man United match in FA Cup
arts.sum: To opt out of the sale or sharing/processing of personal information such as cookies and device identifiers for targeted ads, click on the first option below. If you are a resident of a US state with applicable laws, you may opt out of the sale of your personal info or sharing/processing of your personal information for targeted advertising in the “Manage Your Privacy Choices” section below.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed Khvicha Kvaratskhelia boost
arts.sum: Antonio Conte has confirmed that Kvaratskhelia has asked to leave Napoli this month amid increasing speculation of a January transfer. Sport Italia have revealed that Napoli are interested in signing Alejandro Garnacho if Kvaratskhelia leaves the club in January, with Man Utd therefore potentially able to arrange a swap deal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sustain fresh injury blow as attacker leaves on stretcher in Man United clash
arts.sum: Arsenal are dealt yet another attacking injury concern, as Gabriel Jesus comes off with a knee injury in the Gunners' FA Cup clash with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer brutal injury blow as Gabriel Jesus stretchered off vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus was unable to continue Arsenal's FA Cup clash with Manchester United after suffering an injury following a collision with Red Devils skipper Bruno Fernandes

arts.ttl: Manchester United repeat Liverpool gesture after major Arsenal kit change
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium in the FA Cup on Sunday afternoon but you won't see a red shirt worn on the pitch

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host Manchester United in the FA Cup
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Man United side head to north London for their FA Cp third round clash against Arsenal. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Man United: Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim drops transfer hint with selection for FA Cup showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Amad Diallo is not in the starting XI against Arsenal in the FA Cup due to "a little problem".

arts.ttl: Arsenal explain Riccardo Calafiori absence from Man United clash as Tottenham fear emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are without Riccardo Calafiori for Sunday's FA Cup clash with Manchester United due to a muscle injury, the Gunners confirm.

arts.ttl: Why Amad is on the bench for Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Amad is a surprise absentee from the starting XI for Man United's clash with Arsenal in the FA Cup third round.
